description:
ICICI Lombard has introduced a groundbreaking health insurance product called 'Elevate', marking an industry first with its AI-powered personalized solutions. Launched on August 21, 2024, in Hyderabad, 'Elevate' is designed to meet the needs of today's dynamic lifestyles, addressing unforeseen medical emergencies and medical inflation. This innovative product offers a range of unique features, including Infinite Sum Insured, Infinite Claim Amount, Power Booster Add-on, Reset Benefit, and Infinite Assurance. These features ensure continuous and comprehensive coverage tailored to each policyholder's individual needs.

The AI integration in 'Elevate' enables the product to interpret customer inputs and provide personalized coverage recommendations. This makes 'Elevate' adaptable and responsive, offering extensive protection while considering personal health and financial needs. Additionally, the product comes with 15 in-built covers and multiple personalization options, including coverage for critical illnesses, maternity, personal accidents, and more.

According to Priya Deshmukh, Head of Health Product, Operations & Services at ICICI Lombard, "'Elevate' represents a new era in health insurance, where innovation and customer focus go hand in hand." With this launch, ICICI Lombard continues its commitment to customer-centric, innovative insurance solutions.

VC: 2024/aug/0108
